creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to Joris Dedieu from comment #4)
Joris' suggestion does seem to be the right sequencing.  Though 14.3 Prerelease retains

# grep -B1 -A1 REQ /etc/rc.d/ugidfw
# PROVIDE: ugidfw
# REQUIRE: FILESYSTEMS
# BEFORE: LOGIN

This is also the case on 12.4S
